name: Hearty Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 14 ounce can tomatoes, drained and chopped
1 tablespoon cornstarch dissolved in 3 tbsp water
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, stir together the salt, olive oil, and Tabasco. Add the eggplant, zucchini, and onion, and toss until combined well.
2. Spread the mixture in a large baking pan and broil under a preheated broiler about 3 inches from the heat for 25-30 minutes or until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred around the edges.
3. In a kettle, cook the mushrooms and garlic in butter over moderate heat, stirring occasionally, until the mushrooms release their liquid.
4. Add the tomatoes, tomato juice, wine, marjoram, rosemary, 6 cups water, Worcestershire sauce, and salt and pepper to taste. Stir and bring to a boil.
5. Simmer the mixture, partially covered, for 20 minutes.
6. Stir in the cornstarch mixture and add it to the soup. Continue simmering for an additional 5 minutes.
7. The soup can be made up to 3 days in advance, kept covered and chilled, and reheated over moderate heat until hot.
8. Ladle into heated bowls and sprinkle with Parmesan. Makes about 10 cups.
